mapper.select:
/* StockSaleHistoryMapper.getStockSaleSummaryList: 검색 조건별 주식 종목 합계 조회 */ SELECT H.STOCK_NM_CD , SN.CD_NM AS STOCK_NM , COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_CNT), 0) AS SALE_CNT , COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_AMT), 0) AS SALE_AMT , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_CNT), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_AMT), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_CNT), 0), 2) END AS AVERAGE_SALE_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(H.PROFIT_AMT), 0) AS PROFIT_AMT FROM MY_STOCK_SALE_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SN ON SN.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_NM' AND SN.CD = H.STOCK_NM_CD AND SN.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'
GROUP BY H.STOCK_NM_CD , SN.CD_NM , SN.DISP_ORD ORDER BY SN.DISP_ORD ASC , H.STOCK_NM_CD ASC

/* StockSaleHistoryMapper.getStockSaleRowList: 매매일지 상세 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT H.SALE_HIST_SEQ , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(H.SALE_DT, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS SALE_DT , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD , SA.CD_NM AS STOCK_ACCOUNT_NM , H.STOCK_NM_CD , SN.CD_NM AS STOCK_NM , H.SALE_CNT , H.SALE_AMT , COALESCE(H.PROFIT_AMT, 0) AS PROFIT_AMT , H.MEMO FROM MY_STOCK_SALE_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN COMMON_CODE SN ON SN.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_NM' AND SN.CD = H.STOCK_NM_CD AND SN.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY H.SALE_DT DESC , SA.DISP_ORD ASC , SN.DISP_ORD ASC , H.SALE_HIST_SEQ DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* StockSaleHistoryMapper.getStockSaleRowCount: 매매일지 상세 목록 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MY_STOCK_SALE_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN COMMON_CODE SN ON SN.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_NM' AND SN.CD = H.STOCK_NM_CD AND SN.USE_YN = 'Y'
